headlines.description: Two goals from Danny Welbeck condemned Liverpool to a 2-1 defeat to Brighton on Saturday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Welbeck scores twice as Brighton beat Liverpool

headlines.description: Harry Wilson grabbed his 10th goal of the season as Fulham shoved their former boss Scott Parker closer to the drop with a 3-1 win over Burnley.
headlines.shortLinkText: Harry Wilson scores again as Fulham beat Burnley

headlines.description: A miserable 10 days for Chelsea culminated in a chastening 3-0 defeat as Everton won back-to-back matches at home in the Premier League for the first time this season.
headlines.shortLinkText: Beto scores two as Everton pile misery on Chelsea

headlines.description: Leeds missed the chance to climb six points clear of the Premier League's bottom three after being held to a frustrating 0-0 draw by Brentford at Elland Road.
headlines.shortLinkText: Defences on top as Leeds draw 0-0 with Brentford

events.name: 1. FC Union Berlin at Bayern Munich

headlines.description: Serge Gnabry scored twice as Bayern Munich returned to winning ways in the Bundesliga in style with a 4-0 home victory over Union Berlin.
headlines.shortLinkText: Gnabry brace takes Bayern step closer to title

video.headline: Bayern Munich vs. FC Union Berlin - Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: SOC_One-Play (Bayern Munich vs. FC Union Berlin - Game Highlights) 2026/03/21 ESHEET

headlines.description: Walker Zimmerman scored a goal in the 83rd minute, José Cifuentes added a goal, and Toronto FC beat the Columbus Crew 2-1 on Saturday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Zimmerman nets winner as Toronto beats Columbus

video.headline: Walker Zimmerman's fine header wins it for Toronto

tracking.trackingName: SOC_One-Play (Walker Zimmerman's fine header wins it for Toronto) 2026/03/21 ESHEET

events.name: Chicago Fire FC at Philadelphia Union

headlines.description: Hugo Cuypers scored a goal for the fourth consecutive game, Jonathan Bamba also scored a goal, and the Chicago Fire beat the Philadelphia Union 2-1 on Saturday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Chicago sends Union to 5th straight loss to start '26

events.name: Orlando City SC at Nashville SC

headlines.description: Sam Surridge scored a hat trick -- his third multi-goal game this season -- on Saturday to help Nashville SC beat Orlando City 5-0.
headlines.shortLinkText: Surridge hat trick leads Nashville rout of Orlando

events.name: D.C. United at Atlanta United FC

headlines.description: Sean Johnson had two saves for D.C. United in a 0-0 tie with Atlanta United on Saturday.
headlines.shortLinkText: D.C. United hold Atlanta United to stalemate

events.name: Red Bull New York at Charlotte FC
Houston Dynamo FC at FC Dallas
Colorado Rapids at Sporting Kansas City
New England Revolution at St. Louis CITY SC
San Jose Earthquakes at Vancouver Whitecaps
Boston Legacy FC at Houston Dash
North Carolina Courage at Gotham FC
Angel City FC at Bay FC
León at Atlético de San Luis

headlines.description: Christian Pulisic registered his first goal contribution of 2026 as AC Milan changed gears in the second half to storm to a 3-2 win over Torino on Saturday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Pulisic ends drought as Milan close gap to Inter

headlines.description: Paris Saint-Germain moved one point clear of Lens at the top of the Ligue 1 table once more with a dominant 4-0 victory over 10-man Nice at the Allianz Riviera.
headlines.shortLinkText: Ex-Barca teen Fernández nets 1st PSG goal in win

events.name: West Bromwich Albion at Bristol City

headlines.description: Wrexham came from behind to strengthen their Championship playoff hopes with a 2-1 win at Sheffield United.
headlines.shortLinkText: Wrexham boost playoff hopes with comeback win
